chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 692 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.3129/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 03.06.2025 Mr. Shewak Ram Valecha, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statements have been filed on behalf of respondents No.2, 3 and 4, which are taken on record. Learned AAG Sindh submits that an interim challan has been presented before the concerned Court. When confronted with this development, the learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that he will now avail the appropriate remedy before the trial Court in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
